mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO pq_opinion ( answer_id, opinion_seq, sentiment_code, feature_id, feedback_content_1, feedback_content_2, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.answerId}, #{item.opinionSeq}, #{item.sentimentCode}, #{item.featureId}, #{item.feedbackContent1}, #{item.feedbackContent2}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
